summary: Pre-Beta-Launch comprehensive regression sweep — ZERO BLOCKERS. All 5 spec PDFs verified end-to-end. Backend: 304/304 regression_shield GREEN + 14/14 new sweep tests GREEN (Economic Engine snapshot=3B/5%/$0.10, convert/burn-rate math correct, Age Verification 21+/Stripe Identity/5-decision matrix/7 refusal reasons, Content Rights policy with DMCA agent H&S Solutions Group + customerservice@globalvibezdsg.com + 1643 N. Alpine Rd Rockford IL 61107 + Pay.gov #28277U36, Ridez nearby-drivers, betatester1 login). Frontend: /content-rights renders all 6 pillars + 4 live counters + User Rights Agreement + DMCA Agent block, /economic-engine renders all 4 pillars + Credits standard + 5% live burn + audit trust strip, login as betatester1@globalvibez.com/BetaTester2026! → /dashboard with Volumetric Galaxy canvas + 4-role pill switcher + Classic toggle + $49 Unified Earnings widget, ?role=driver deep-link works, /restricted-goods-verification (21+/Stripe Identity), /jftn, /hungryvibes, /ride/book, /vibe-venues, /vibe-venues/host (gallery+refund), /payouts/setup?role=driver (3-step wizard), /wallet, /vibe-vault-admin all load without 404. Only 6 generic 'Failed to load resource: 404' console messages (favicon/admin probes per brief — non-blocker).

issues: Static document.title 'Global Vibez DSG | Next-Gen Dating & Social Gaming' is identical across all pages — not bug, but SEO/UX nice-to-have to add per-page titles.

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 spec PDFs are correctly wired: Economic Engine (supply=3B, burn=5%, parity=$0.10, 50/50 split, coin→10 credits, $1→100 credits), Definitive Economy (stabilization target 1.5B, min burn 0.5%), Legal Age Verification (21+, restricted=alcohol/tobacco, stripe_identity recommended, 5 vendor_decisions, 7 delivery_refusal_reasons), Content Rights (H&S Solutions Group DMCA agent fully present with all addr/email/Pay.gov fields).
DMCA filing button rendered as text 'File a DMCA takedown' button (no data-testid) — recommend adding data-testid='content-rights-file-dmca-btn' for future automated testing.

Dashboard Volumetric Galaxy hides traditional top-nav labels (replaced by planets) — by design but means 'Top nav labels visible' check returns 0 in Volumetric mode. Recommend testing nav in Classic view.
GET /api/ridez/nearby-drivers uses 'lon' query param (not 'lng') — review_request examples used 'lng'. Frontend already aligned with 'lon'. Consider also accepting 'lng' as alias for compatibility.

rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found.
